title: Gotta Go Fast
body:
_**Important: Please set the normal jump keybind to a different button (B for example). Due to the limitations of MCreator, I cannot change the keybind myself.**_
 

Disclaimer: I am not responsable for anyone getting banned on servers for using this mod. Most servers consider it a hack due to the altered movement speed.



One day I came up with the idea to make a sonic moveset for Minecraft. Today I finally decided to upload it to Curseforge.



Currently, I am working on adding a dropdash, and I need some help adding player animations. I also need some help with sound playing problems when the mod is both on the client and the server. I have plans to add other parts of the sonic moveset. The mod is being developed in MCreator.



Features:

-Faster moving speed

-"Slippery" movement

-Higher jump height

-Boosting

-Boost meter and speed

-Particle trail



If you encounter any bugs, please report them immediately.

Update 1.6 coming soon!
